title: Breakwave Weekend Read
summary:
Main
As we conclude the workweek and head into the weekend, take a moment to review the key articles from this week, including those you've highlighted. 2024 Realities , Choppy Waters Ahead , Free Trade Area , Trump's Wall of Tariffs , and more. VLCC Futures Explode Higher Amid New Russian Shipping Sanctions - The tanker market has seen a significant surge in freight futures over the past few days, driven by a notable announcement from the U.S.
